title: Stenanthera gabonensis
taxonomy: Stenanthera gabonensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of central Africa. Stenanthera gabonensis is classified as a member of the genus Stenanthera, which is part of the larger family Gesneriaceae. The genus Stenanthera is further classified under the order Lamiales, which comprises numerous families of flowering plants. The classification of Stenanthera gabonensis reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Gesneriaceae family.
uses: Stenanthera gabonensis has been reported to have various medicinal uses. It is traditionally used in West and Central Africa to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The plant is also said to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its medicinal benefits.
